description: Poster from the Department of Labor with a dark navy-to-black gradient background. The top two-thirds show a desaturated, blue-tinted black-and-white photograph of Donald Trump in a suit, eyes closed and smiling, hands together mid-applause, lit against the dark backdrop. Across the lower half, in large white serif numerals, is '100%' followed by italic serif text 'of net job growth has gone to' and, in a solid blue bar, bold all-caps text 'AMERICAN-BORN WORKERS'. A small white DOL eagle seal is centered at the bottom.
notable_text: 100% of net job growth has gone to AMERICAN-BORN WORKERS
